summary: The diff implements the majority of the required functionality across all 7 requirements. REQ-1 through REQ-7 are substantially addressed. However, there are a few gaps: the PaywallScreen title renders 'Upgrade to Premium' rather than the required 'Upgrade to Studiora Premium'; the launchBillingFlow function always succeeds and never rejects with 'Payment cancelled or failed.' (no cancellation simulation path exists); and the backend includes unrequested trial mode functionality.

missing_requirements.requirement: PaywallScreen title must read 'Upgrade to Studiora Premium'
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the PaywallScreen h2 renders 'Upgrade to Premium' (missing 'Studiora' in the heading), not the required 'Upgrade to Studiora Premium'.

missing_requirements.requirement: launchBillingFlow must reject with 'Payment cancelled or failed.' on cancellation/failure
missing_requirements.reason: The googlePlayBilling.ts implementation always resolves successfully with a purchase token and never rejects. There is no simulated cancellation path, so the rejection case required by REQ-2 is not implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: clearPurchases() utility function exported from googlePlayBilling.ts
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires initBillingClient, launchBillingFlow, acknowledgePurchase, and queryPurchases to be exported. clearPurchases() was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Trial mode system (startTrial, getTrialStatus, getGuestTrialStatus, userTrialStates) added to backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention trial mode at all. These functions and data structures were not requested and represent unrequested backend additions.

hallucinated_features.description: useAmbientSound hook with full AudioContext-based sound generation engine
hallucinated_features.reason: While advanced focus settings are mentioned as a premium feature, implementing a full AudioContext ambient sound engine was not part of the build request requirements.
